generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelVisualDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor for real-time speed measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor for real-time steering measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance IntelVisualDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435i
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted, IntelVisualDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler, KalmanFilterProcessingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateParametersData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state parameters including speed and steering angle stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control logic per ISO 15622 standard"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for AI and deep learning on Jetson NX and Orin Nano"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DBSCANProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN processing implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance KalmanFilterProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter processing implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control logic implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization and reporting of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTime3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system execution on Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, FollowingSpeedDecisionAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC via UI for setting desired speed and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides DesiredSpeedSettingAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTime3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of object tracks and driving path for driver transparency"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Lead vehicle detection for ACC system"
]

instance FollowingSpeedDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Computes following speed for ACC control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DesiredSpeedSettingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller motor actuator converting desired speed commands to motor voltage"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator for vehicle steering adjustments"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity containing vehicle sensors and actuators"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LX, IntelDeepsenseD435i, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity developed using ISO 23247 RA requirements-driven design (R1-R8), implemented as ROS2 packages"
    base:contains DBSCANModel, KalmanFilterModel, ACCControlLogic, ObjectTracksData, VehicleStateParametersData
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity for remote control interface"
    base:contains RemoteManagementService
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cross-System Entity for integration with other systems"
    base:contains ROS2Middleware
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals including desired speed, emergency braking commands, and ACC enable/disable commands transmitted from the DT's Controlling FE to the vehicle's motor and steering servo actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100ms end-to-end latency (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and 100ms clock synchronization accuracy between components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "ISO 23247-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle), Digital Twin Entity (off-vehicle), User Entity (UI), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), communicating via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated) for the ACC system in a deployed 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 15622 for ACC functionality and adherence to 100ms latency and clock sync requirements for real-time safety-critical operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication between vehicle and external DT components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson hardware; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity hosted externally with data stored in SQL database on external device."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture and ISO 15622 for ACC system implementation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical operations addressed via compliance with 3GPP TS 22.185 latency requirements (≤100ms) and 100ms clock synchronization accuracy; no specific cybersecurity measures detailed."
]
